title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXV. Riddles.
content:
[Sunshine.]

        Hick-a-more, Hack-a-more,
        On the king's kitchen-door;
        All the king's horses,
        And all the king's men,
        Couldn't drive Hick-a-more, Hack-a-more,
        Off the king's kitchen-door!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLXXXV. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
